segment.source: Two-column hero placing headline and lead text beside a price card with amount, billing period, checkmark feature list, and call-to-action button. Use it for: single-offer pages that state one price up front — course fees, memberships, flat-rate services, starting-at offers with included features. Prefer 'Three Tier Pricing' or 'Pricing Section' for multiple plans; 'Single-Price Card' for a plain price card further down the page.
